results.title: Nick Jonas reveals one Disney movie that still makes him cry, says watching it with daughter Malti is ‘totally special’
results.description: Singer-actor Nick Jonas has shared a heartwarming parenting moment, revealing that Disney's classic The Lion King still brings him to tears. The emotional connection has only deepened now that he gets to experience the film alongside his daughter, Malti.

results.title: Meghan Markle quietly takes over task after Princess Kate gives up
results.description: The Duke of Sussex and his elder brother Prince William are still estranged and haven’t spoken to each other in over three years. Even though Harry has made attempts at an olive branch but it didn’t help. Previously, Princess Kate was known to be a mediator between William...

results.title: Alison Steadman reads ‘Recuerdo’ in memory of her parents and two ‘lovely’ sisters
results.description: Alison Steadman reads “Recuerdo” by Edna St Vincent Millay in remembrance of both her parents and her two “lovely” sisters. “It’s very sad but I comfort myself in the memory that I had such kindness given to me,” Steadman says. The short film, directed by Oliver Parker and shot at Dr Johnson’s House in London, is part of a series to commemorate Celebration Day – a nationwide movement that encourages Brits to take a moment and remember those we have lost who have shaped our lives. Curated by Allie Esiri, the films will be published exclusively on The Independent in the lead-up to Celebration Day on Monday 25 May.

results.title: Waseem Abbas gets honest about why he avoids staying at son Ali Abbas’s home
results.description: Veteran Pakistani actor Waseem Abbas has sparked discussion online after candidly sharing his thoughts on today’s generation, changing family values, and the growing gap between parents and children in modern times.
